cards.detectability: consistency catches the incoherent kind; the coherent drift requires semantic evaluation (oracle)

kinds.context_drift: a coherent wrong value (final recomputed to match) -> passes the consistency invariant, ESCAPES; needs oracle
kinds.context_inconsistent: a wrong value with the final left unchanged -> breaks final==sum(context); caught

cards.name: Context corruption
cards.what: A plausible WRONG value enters the task's running context and flows into the final result. The output stays well-formed.

cards.detectability: recall 1.0 — counting and equality, no correctness model

kinds.budget_exhaustion: the loop hits the step budget without completing
kinds.repetition: the loop repeats a step and never progresses

cards.name: Loop exhaustion
cards.what: The agent loop fails to terminate correctly within its step budget (6); a clean task completes in 4 steps.
